Crystal.Avalonia
Table of Contents

Class CrystalApplication

Namespace
Crystal.Avalonia
Assembly
Crystal.Avalonia.dll

The base application class, extending Avalonia's Avalonia.Application. Provides the foundation for modular development and MVVM binding.

public class CrystalApplication : Application, INotifyPropertyChanged, IDataContextProvider, IGlobalDataTemplates, IDataTemplateHost, IGlobalStyles, IStyleHost, IThemeVariantHost, IResourceHost, IResourceNode, IApplicationPlatformEvents

object.ToString()

Examples

public class MyApp : CrystalApplication
{
    public override void RegisterModules(IModuleRegistrar moduleRegistrar)
    {
        moduleRegistrar.RegisterModule<MyModule>();
    }

    public override void RegisterServices(IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddMvvmBindingTransient<MainView, MainViewModel>();
    }

    public override void CreateShell(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
    {
        if (ApplicationLifetime is IClassicDesktopStyleApplicationLifetime desktop)
            desktop.MainWindow = new MainWindow();
    }
}

Remarks

Usage steps:

  1. Define modules: Create classes implementing IModule.
  2. Override RegisterModules(IModuleRegistrar): Register all functional modules.
  3. Override RegisterServices(IServiceCollection): Register application-level services (optional).
  4. Override CreateShell(IServiceProvider): Create the main window or main view.

Methods

CreateShell(IServiceProvider)

Override this method to create the main shell (window or view) of the application.

public virtual void CreateShell(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)

Parameters

serviceProvider IServiceProvider

The service provider, can be used to resolve services registered in RegisterServices(IServiceCollection) or modules.

OnFrameworkInitializationCompleted() 

public override void OnFrameworkInitializationCompleted()

RegisterModules(IModuleRegistrar)

Override this method to register all functional modules for the application.

public virtual void RegisterModules(IModuleRegistrar moduleRegistrar)

Parameters

moduleRegistrar IModuleRegistrar

The module registrar, used to register IModule implementations.

Examples

public override void RegisterModules(IModuleRegistrar moduleRegistrar)
{
    moduleRegistrar.RegisterModule<HomeModule>();
    moduleRegistrar.RegisterModule<SettingsModule>();
}

RegisterServices(IServiceCollection)

Override this method to register application-level services. It is recommended to use AddMvvmBindingTransient<TView, TViewModel>(IServiceCollection) or AddMvvmBindingSingleton<TView, TViewModel>(IServiceCollection) to register View/ViewModel pairs.

public virtual void RegisterServices(IServiceCollection services)

Parameters

services IServiceCollection

The service collection to add application-level services to.
